debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ ⊥ ∉ @decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R

proof:
intro h
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
    simpa using h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'
failed_attempts:
intro h
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ (by simp_all)
  <;> try contradiction
  <;> simp_all

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ (λ (D : Set α), D) (⊥ : Set α) := by
    simp
  have h₂ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := by
    intro D hD
    have h₃ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
    exact h₃
  -- Contradiction derivation from the fact that ⊥ is in the union but not in any D in R
  have h₃ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    -- Since ⊥ is in the union, there must be some D in R containing ⊥
    have h₄ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
    have h₅ : decomposition_of_refinement R = ⋃ D ∈ R, D := rfl
    rw [h₅] at h₄
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at h₄
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₄
    exact ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₃
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := h₂ D hD
  exact h₄ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := by simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using h₁
  have h₃ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₂
    exact ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₃
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    apply R.bot_not_mem
    <;> aesop
  exact h₄ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, h₂⟩ := h₁
  have h₃ := R.2.2.1 D hD
  simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  <;> aesop

intro h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ ⋃ (D : Set α) (_ : D ∈ (R : Set (Set α))), D := by
    intro h₂
    have h₃ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
      obtain ⟨D, hD⟩ := h₂
      exact ⟨D, hD.1, hD.2⟩
    obtain ⟨D, hD₁, hD₂⟩ := h₃
    have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
      have h₅ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
        exact R.bot_not_mem D hD₁
      exact h₅
    exact h₄ hD₂
  simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using h₁ h

intro h
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem I hI hI'
  exact h₁

simp [decomposition_of_refinement]
  <;>
  (try aesop) <;>
  (try
    {
      rintro _ ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
      have h := R.bot_not_mem D hD
      aesop
    })
  <;>
  aesop

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD_in, x, hx_in, hx⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD_in
  exact h₁ (by simp_all)

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₃ : D ∈ R := hD
  exact R.bot_not_mem D h₃ h₂
  <;>
  simp_all [refinement.bot_not_mem]
  <;>
  aesop

have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    intro h
    have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
    have h₃ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
      simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h₂
      exact h₂
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₃
    have h₄ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
    have h₅ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
      have h₆ : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), ⊥ ∉ D := by
        intro D hD
        have h₇ : R.bot_not_mem D hD
        exact h₇
      exact h₆ D hD
    exact h₅ h₄
  exact h₁

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ I := by
    have h₃ : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), ⊥ ∉ D := by
      intro D hD
      have h₄ : R.bot_not_mem D hD
      exact h₄
    exact h₃ I hI
  exact h₂ hI'

have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ ⋃ (D : Set α) (H : D ∈ (R : Set (Set α))), D := by
    intro h
    rw [Set.mem_iUnion] at h
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
    have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
    exact h₂ hD'
  simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using h₁

simp [decomposition_of_refinement]
  intro h
  obtain ⟨I, hI, k, hk⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem _ hI
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ I := by simpa [hk] using hk
  exact h₁ h₂
successful_attempts:
intro h
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
    simpa using h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : D ∈ R := hD
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∈ D := by simpa using hD'
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D h₂
  contradiction

intro h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R.carrier ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simpa [Set.mem_iUnion] using h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₁
  simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at h₁
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ I := hI'
  have h₃ : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), ⊥ ∉ D := by
    intro D hD
    have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
      have h₅ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
      exact h₅
    exact h₄
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∈ (I : Set α) := h₂
  have h₅ : I ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) := hI
  have h₆ : ⊥ ∉ I := h₃ I h₅
  exact h₆ h₄

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₃ h₂

have h_main : ⊥ ∉ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    intro h
    -- If ⊥ is in the decomposition, then there exists a set D in the carrier such that ⊥ is in D.
    have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R.carrier ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
      simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
      obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
      exact ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
    -- Obtain such a D.
    obtain ⟨D, hD_carrier, hD_bot⟩ := h₁
    -- Use the property that ⊥ is not in any set in the carrier.
    have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD_carrier
    -- Contradiction arises as ⊥ is both in and not in D.
    exact h₂ hD_bot
  exact h_main

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h₁
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ I := hI'
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  exact h₃ h₂

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₂ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  simp_all

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    apply R.bot_not_mem
    <;> aesop
  exact h₃ h₂

have h₁ : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), ⊥ ∈ D → False := by
    intro D hD hD'
    have h₂ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
    have h₃ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
    apply h₂
    exact h₃
  intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simpa using hD'
  have h₃ : D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) := by simpa using hD
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∈ D → False := h₁ D h₃
  exact h₄ h₂

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
    simpa using h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'

simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement]
  -- We need to show that ⊥ is not in the union of all D in R
  -- By the refinement property, no D in R contains ⊥
  have h : ∀ D ∈ ({D : Set α | D ∈ R} : Set (Set α)), ⊥ ∉ D := by
    intro D hD
    have h₁ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem
    simpa using h₁ D (by simpa using hD)
  -- Since no D in R contains ⊥, the union also does not contain ⊥
  have h₂ : ∀ (x : α), (∃ (D : Set α), (D ∈ R ∧ x ∈ D)) → x ≠ ⊥ := by
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨D, hD, hx⟩
    have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := h D hD
    intro h₄
    rw [h₄] at hx
    exact h₃ hx
  -- If ⊥ were in the union, it would be in some D in R, but we know no such D exists
  by_contra h₃
  have h₄ : ∃ (D : Set α), (D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D) := by
    classical
    -- ∃ (D : Set α), (D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D)
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at h₃
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₃
    exact ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
  -- This leads to a contradiction because no D in R contains ⊥
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₄
  have h₅ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₆ : ⊥ ∉ D := h D hD
  exact h₆ h₅

rw [decomposition_of_refinement]
  intro h
  simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, h_bot⟩ := h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ h_bot

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    have h₂ : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), ⊥ ∉ D := by
      intro D hD
      exact R.bot_not_mem D hD
    exact h₂ D hD
  contradiction

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
      have h₄ : D ∈ R := hD
      have h₅ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
        have h₆ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := by
          intro D hD
          exact R.bot_not_mem D hD
        exact h₆ D h₄
      exact h₅
    exact h₃
  exact h₂ h₁

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'
